title: Add pause/resume to study timer and daily motivational quote to dashboard

requirements.text: Update the StudyTimer component to add pause and resume functionality: add a Pause button that appears when timer is running, and a Resume button that appears when timer is paused, preserving elapsed time across pause/resume cycles

quotes: Start and pause / resume Stop timer

acceptanceCriteria: When timer is running, a Pause button is visible
Clicking Pause stops the timer but preserves elapsed time
When timer is paused, a Resume button is visible
Clicking Resume continues counting from the paused elapsed time
Stop button remains available to end the session and save time

requirements.text: Ensure the StudyTimer component tracks study time separately for each selected subject/chapter, maintaining accurate time accumulation per chapter when timer stops

quotes: Track time separately for each subject/chapter

acceptanceCriteria: Timer only runs when a chapter is selected
Accumulated time is saved to the correct chapter when Stop is clicked
Switching chapters resets the timer display
Each chapter maintains its own separate accumulated study time

requirements.text: Add a motivational quote display component to the dashboard that shows a different inspirational quote each day, placed prominently near the top of the dashboard page

quotes: add feature in dashboard daily motivational quote

acceptanceCriteria: A quote card is visible on the dashboard
The quote changes daily based on the current date
The quote is displayed in a visually appealing format consistent with the warm earth-tone design theme
A collection of at least 10-15 motivational quotes is available for rotation

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo for the timer pause/resume functionality as it only requires frontend state management
Do not modify files in frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx
Maintain the existing warm earth-tone color palette (terracotta, sage green, cream) for the motivational quote component
nonGoals: Fetching motivational quotes from external APIs
Adding user customization for quote preferences
Implementing quote sharing or social features
Modifying the daily study goal setting functionality (already exists)
